title: Task
description: A task or work item that belongs to a board column

title.description: Short summary of what needs to be done

description.description: Detailed description or notes about the task

column.description: Key of the board column this task belongs to

position.description: Sort order within the column (lower is higher)

due_date.description: Date by which the task should be completed

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the task was marked complete

assignee.description: Person or agent assigned to the task

effort.description: Estimated effort to complete the task
